text:
AdNews Newsletter

QMS served a record of more than 40,000 pieces of content during the Olympic Games across its Paris 2024 Digital Screen Network.

The content comprised of breaking news, what to watch, medal moments and medal tally updates, along with dynamically served brand ads from Allianz, Woolworths and Patties Food Group.

The QMS networklaunched in mid-Apriland will run until the closing ceremony of the Paralympic Games on September 8. QMS is the official and exclusive outdoor media partner of both the Australian Olympic and Paralympic Teams.

The Paris 2024 Digital Screen Network spans QMS digital large format billboards, the City of Sydney street furniture network, The Convenience Network, Canberra Airport and Gold Coast street furniture assets, rallying the nation to celebrate and support our athletes nationally.

QMS chief sales officer, Tim Murphy, said the partnership with the Australian Olympic Committee has supercharged the outdoor player's ability to showcase the benefits of being a digital-first out of home network during the Paris 2024 Olympic Games.

"For example, our breaking news headlines were delivered so quickly that we were live across our billboards nationally with the Australian Women’s 4 x 100m Relay team gold medal to peak hour commuters before they had even left the pool deck in Paris!” he said.

“For QMS, the Paris 2024 Olympic Games have been the preeminent display of how brands can utilise the immediacy of digital out-of-home (DOOH) and its geographical impact to deliver broadcast scale audience reach with relevant and contextualised creative content that can connect on community cultures like never before. This is a momentous step change for DOOH and the role it can play in major events and campaigns."

Murphy said that by tapping into the immediacy and scale of digital, QMS have showcased how advanced its digital capabilities now are, and in doing so, delivered the gold standard for partners.

“I’d like to congratulate and thank our partner brands Woolworths, Toyota, Allianz, Stan and Patties Food Group who jumped at the opportunity to help engage Australian’s as they went about their day. It’s truly been out of the ordinary," he said.

QMS’ Paris 2024 Digital Screen Network will continue delivering breaking news, what to watch, medal moments and medal tallies for the duration of the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games, which kick off this Thursday.

title: QMS delivered 40,000 pieces of content during Olympic Games - AdNews
description: Across its Paris 2024 Digital Screen Network.
